completed_phases: F.kernel_state (1): kernel_state.py + 18 tests
F.governor (2): governor.py + tools/wd_kernel_tick.py + schemas/action_recommendation.schema.json + 17 tests
F.mission_queue (3): mission_queue.py + schemas/mission.schema.json + 27 tests
F.budget_engine (4): budget_engine.py + schemas/budget_state.schema.json + 21 tests

F.policy_core (5): policy_core.py + 13 tests; bounded adaptive policy that may tighten/narrow_scope/add_advisory_check but NEVER relax/remove/mutate hard rules; PolicyValidationError on forbidden verbs
F.action_gate (6): action_gate.py + 17 tests; the ONLY exit point from the kernel; runs breaker + policy + budget checks; admits/defers/rejects but NEVER executes
F.attention_allocator (7): attention_allocator.py; routes attention across 8 lanes; breaker open/quarantined → weight 0; budget low → ×0.3; deterministic + renormalized to sum=1.0
F.background_scheduler (8): background_scheduler.py; one tick → ordered missions → breaker filter → action_gate batch evaluation → DispatchReport with selected/deferred/blocked

F.micro_learning_lane (9): micro_learning_lane.py; fast reprioritization from gate verdicts (DEFER -0.05, REJECT_HARD -1.0, REJECT_SOFT -0.10); apply_hints clamps priority at 0; never mutates input lists

F.circuit_breaker (10): circuit_breaker.py + schemas/circuit_breaker_state.schema.json; closed→open→half_open→closed transitions; quarantined after 3 open cycles; append-only chained event log with sha-validation
G.cognition_ir: schemas/cognition_ir + capsule_manifest + ir/{cognition_ir,ir_validator,ir_translator,ir_compatibility}.py + 4 adapters + capsules/{capsule_registry,capsule_resolver}.py + 33 tests
H.vector_identity_ingestion: vector_provenance_graph + identity_anchor + ingestion_dedup + universal_ingestor + link_manager + link_watcher + 3 CLI tools + 37 tests
I.world_model: world_model_snapshot + delta + external_evidence + causal_engine + prediction_engine + calibrator + drift_detector + CLI + 31 tests
P.reality_view: reality_view + hologram_adapter + hologram_snapshot + render_hologram_reality CLI + 21 tests; 11 panels; never-fabricate-values invariant
V.conversation: presence_log + context_synthesizer + meta_dialogue + identity yamls + 5 meta question kinds + 28 tests
J.provider_plane_distillation: 4 schemas + provider_plane (registry/router/agent_pool/request_pack/response_normalizer/budget) + api_distillation (extractor/consultant/replay) + 40 tests
U1.solver_synthesis_declarative: 10 default families + family_registry + declarative_spec + bulk_rule_extractor + deterministic_compiler + bootstrap CLI + 34 tests
U2.builder_lane: 7 modules (worktree_allocator, request_pack, result_pack, router, session_forge, repair_forge, mentor_forge) + 2 schemas + CLI + 37 tests
U3.autonomous_solver_synthesis: gap_to_solver_spec + candidate_store + quarantine + validators + CLI + 33 tests
L.memory_tiering: 4 tiers + access_pattern_tracker + pinning_engine + invariant_extractor + tier_manager + CLI + 33 tests

K.hex_runtime_topology: 7 modules (cell_local_state, cell_runtime, cell_message_contract, parent_child_relations, ring_messaging, subdivision_operator) + 4 live_states + 4 subdivision_states + 37 tests
M.promotion_ladder: 14 stages + STAGE_CRITERIA + stage_validators + rollback_engine + 30 tests; const True no_runtime_auto_promotion + no_bypass

O.proposal_compiler: schemas/proposal_compiler.schema.json + waggledance/core/proposal_compiler/{affected_files_analyzer,test_generator,rollout_planner,acceptance_criteria_compiler,patch_generator,pr_draft_compiler}.py + tools/compile_meta_proposal.py + 28 tests; ProposalBundle includes patch_skeleton + affected_files + test_spec + rollout_plan + rollback_plan + acceptance_criteria + review_checklist + pr_draft_md; const True no_main_branch_auto_merge + no_runtime_mutation enforced via source-grep test (no git push origin main / git apply / promote_to_runtime / auto_apply_patch / merge_to_main); compile_bundle deterministic and byte-stable; CLI emits bundle.json + pr_draft.md + patch_skeleton.diff + review_checklist.md to disk under --apply only

N.local_model_distillation: SAFE SCAFFOLD — schemas/local_model_record.schema.json + waggledance/core/local_intelligence/{local_model_manager,fine_tune_pipeline,inference_router,model_evaluator,drift_detector}.py + docs/architecture/LOCAL_MODEL_DISTILLATION.md + 39 tests. Hard rules: no torch/transformers/ollama/openai/anthropic/requests/httpx/subprocess imports; FineTunePipeline.execute() raises by design; InferenceRouter refuses 6 critical task_kinds (foundational_axiom_authoring/runtime_mutation_proposal/main_branch_merge_decision/human_facing_calibration_claim/self_model_promotion/world_model_promotion); local routing default-disabled and even when enabled returns local_model_shadow with external_provider fallback; DriftDetector emits 4-band advisory severity (nominal/watch/elevated/critical); all records carry const True advisory_only + no_runtime_auto_promotion + no_foundational_mutation; lifecycle_status enum {shadow_only, advisory, retired} — NO production status by design

Q.cross_capsule_observer: waggledance/core/cross_capsule/{cross_capsule_observer,abstract_pattern_registry}.py + docs/architecture/HIGH_RISK_VARIANTS_DEFERRED.md + docs/architecture/EXPERIMENTAL_AUTONOMY_PROFILE.md + 27 tests. Observer consumes only redacted CapsuleSignalSummary (redacted=True invariant) and emits CrossCapsuleObservation with const True redacted + advisory_only + no_raw_data_leakage. 4 OBSERVABLE_PATTERN_KINDS (recurring_oscillation / recurring_blind_spot_class / recurring_proposal_bottleneck / recurring_contradiction_pattern). AbstractPatternRegistry append-only with deterministic 12-char observation_id, by_kind() filter, byte-stable to_json(). HIGH_RISK_VARIANTS_DEFERRED.md documents 6 deferred topics with explicit blockers (parallel ensembles / predictive preheating / unbounded micro-learning / canary auto-promotion / local model escalation / generative memory compression). EXPERIMENTAL_AUTONOMY_PROFILE.md specifies named/pinned/approved/reversible/observed contract a future profile MUST satisfy before any introduction. Source-grep verifies no requests/httpx/subprocess/torch/transformers/openai/anthropic/ollama/promote_to_runtime imports and no =False on any invariant flag.
